name: EU Late Payment Directive Reference Rate

metadata.basis: ECB main refinancing rate on first day of half-year

annual_rate.notes: Derived: EU Late Payment Directive (2011/7/EU) reference rate = the ECB main refinancing rate in force on the first calendar day of the half-year (2026-07-01: 2.4%). A member state's statutory late-payment rate is this reference + at least 8 percentage points (e.g. 10.4% at the 8pp floor; some states add more — France +10, Germany +9). Reference, not legal advice.
